title: AI reveals hidden connections within legal systems
description: As governments worldwide explore how artificial intelligence can transform decision-making, a recent study from Sultan Qaboos University demonstrates how AI can uncover hidden connections within legal systems—offering a powerful tool to support smarter lawmaking. Published in The Journal of Engineering Research, the study applies natural language processing (NLP) and network analysis to Oman's Labor Law of 2023, revealing a complex web of interdependencies between its articles that may not be apparent through conventional legal review.

title: AP says it will offer buyouts as part of pivot away from newspaper journalism
description: The news organization is becoming more focused on visual journalism and developing new revenue sources, particularly through companies investing in artificial intelligence.
content:
"We're not a newspaper company and we haven't been for quite some time," Julie Pace, executive editor and senior vice president of the AP, said in an interview.

title: DoPT secretary signals policy push to embed AI in core governance
description: New Delhi, Apr 6 (PTI) Department of Personnel and Training Secretary Rachna Shah on Monday underscored a clear policy thrust towards integrating artificial intelligence (AI) into core government processes. Addressing a Samuhik Charcha on “AI in Public Governance” as part of Mission Karmayogi’s National Learning Week (SADHANA Saptah), she pointed to emerging AI-enabled solutions such […]

title: AP says it will offer buyouts as part of pivot away from newspaper journalism
description: The news organization is becoming more focused on visual journalism and developing new revenue sources, particularly through companies investing in artificial intelligence, to cope with the economic collapse of many legacy news outlets.
content:
The Associated Press said Monday it is offering buyouts to an unspecified number of its U.S.-based journalists as part of an acceleration away from the focus on newspaper journalism that sustained the company since the mid-1800s.
The news organizatio... [5105 chars]

title: Tech and AI leasing surges help launch South Bay office market rebound
description: Tech companies and artificial intelligence upstarts have unleashed a South Bay leasing surge that has produced the region's best quarter for office space rental activity since the end of the coronavirus outbreak.
content:
Tech companies and artificial intelligence upstarts have unleashed a South Bay leasing surge that has produced the region’s best quarter for office space rental activity since the end of the coronavirus outbreak, a new report has disclosed.

title: White House: Increased Productivity Means Fed Can Cut Rates
description: White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett believes a supply shock in the U.S. economy caused by capital spending and higher productivity from artificial intelligence will allow the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, he told CNBC on Monday.
